3148570.name: 忍者大乱斗！ - Ninjam! Demo -
3148570.description:
Master the Battle with Diverse Ninja Tools! Chaotic Ninja Brawl!


"Ninjam!" is a multiplayer-only 3D action battle game for 2 to 4 players. Defeat your opponents with projectile and close-range attacks, and be the first to score 5 points in the chaotic skirmish to win. Compete against rivals using a wide variety of ninja tools with various effects! To earn the title of "God of Ninja," let’s settle this... with a fair showdown today!

********************************************
The [Demo Version] includes the following features:
  • Unique 6 stages
  • Victory by scoring 1 to 10 points
  • Normal battle

    Note:
  • Team battles are not available in the [Demo Version].
  • Remote play is possible using Steam Remote Play Together.
    ********************************************

    Each player begins with their ninja character starting every round armed with a "dagger" and "shuriken." Stop your rival's movements with projectiles that have a stun effect, and then immediately attack with close-range weapons! There are no extra lives, making this a one-hit knockout chaotic battle!

    The ninja tools (close-range weapons, projectiles, items) randomly appearing from boxes have various attack ranges, speeds, and additional effects. There might even be a chance for a comeback!?




    • Compete with up to 4 players in both online and offline modes!
    • No extra lives; if you get hit by a close-range attack, you're immediately out!
    • Stun fleeing rivals with your projectiles.
    • Random powerful items may appear from boxes!?
    • Simple controls using only 4 buttons (close-range weapon, projectile, item use, dash).
    • Unique stage mechanics! Watch out for traps like falling floors, rolling logs and snowballs, being blown away by strong winds, and getting swept away by floods—there are tons of gimmicks to discover!
3148570.supported_languages: 日语, 英语, 简体中文
